rulings.Case Title: MARY SUENNEN et al VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 4, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Lehigh Hanson, Inc.¿s motion to quash service of summons is granted pursuant to the September 30 stipulated order in the lead case of Paillet v. Crown Cork and Seal (No. 275807). If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am in Dept. 503, not 9:30am in Dept. 220. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. = (503/TLJ)
